CustomField.description: Semicolon-delimited list of cooperating agencies identified from the NEPA Permit Matrix for this project sector and type. Populated automatically by NEPA_Permit_Coordinator flow. Coordinator should confirm participation before issuing NOI/NOA.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Cooperating agencies from permit matrix. Confirm participation before publishing NOI.
CustomField.label: Cooperating Agencies (Matrix)
